name: riot-v3-language-features
description: Language support for Riot.js v3 single-file components
author: duza11

riotV3.allowDynamicObjectProperties.description: Allow unknown child properties when a component property is assigned a value typed as any. Known object shapes and nullish initializers are preserved. Requires reloading VS Code.

scripts.pack: pnpm --filter @duza11/riot-v3-language-server build && pnpm run build && vsce package --pre-release --no-dependencies
scripts.pack:labs: pnpm --filter @duza11/riot-v3-language-server build && pnpm run build -- --volar-labs && vsce package --pre-release --no-dependencies
scripts.release: pnpm --filter @duza11/riot-v3-language-server build && pnpm run build && vsce publish --pre-release --no-dependencies
